title: Epallage dentata
intro: Epallage dentata, also known as Epalrestat, is a plant species traditionally used in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Epallage dentata include its potential to reduce glucose production in the liver, making it a possible treatment for diabetes, as well as its ability to lower the levels of advanced glycation end products (AGEs) in the body, which can contribute to various diseases. The bioactive constituents of Epallage dentata include epalrestat, which is a pyridazinone derivative with aldose reductase inhibitory activity, as well as other compounds that have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Epallage dentata is commonly prepared as a capsule or tablet for oral administration, and it has been used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including diabetes and other metabolic disorders.
